seoTitle: Willunga Hill vs Willunga South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willunga Hill and Willunga South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Willunga Hill vs Willunga South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willunga Hill and Willunga South.
heading: Willunga Hill vs Willunga South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willunga Hill, South Australia and Willunga South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willunga South has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Willunga Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willunga Hill or Willunga South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willunga Hill has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Willunga South scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willunga Hill scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Willunga South scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willunga Hill or Willunga South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willunga South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
